overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a lush urban park with dense vegetation, transitioning to a concrete plaza with NPCs, ascending stairs beneath futuristic overpasses, and encountering a biohazard truck in a corporate plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with fallen logs

events.description: emerging from dense forest vegetation into open plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through dense vegetation on a narrow dirt trail

entered.detail: thick green foliage and bushes surrounding the path on all sides
large decaying log lying across the right side of the path
narrow dirt trail with patches of sunlight filtering through canopy

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a densely vegetated forest trail with thick foliage and a fallen log. The camera moves forward along a dirt path with dappled sunlight, approaching an opening that reveals an urban plaza ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with benches and futuristic lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza passing benches with sitting NPCs

notable_agents.action: sitting on a concrete bench with another person

entered.detail: open paved area with patterned concrete tiles
modern concrete seating where NPCs are resting
tall vertical light fixture glowing with white light
tall modern building with reflective glass facade visible through trees

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a sunlit urban plaza with concrete paving and modern benches where NPCs are sitting. A futuristic light pillar stands prominently in the center while glass office buildings rise in the background beyond the tree line.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stairway ascending under concrete overpass

events.description: entering deep shadow beneath the concrete overpass structure
beginning ascent of wide concrete stairs flanked by walls

agents.ego_description: walking toward and climbing the concrete stairs leading upward under the overpass

notable_agents.action: descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: wide set of concrete stairs leading upward between retaining walls
tall concrete walls flanking the stairway with light fixtures mounted
massive concrete highway or walkway structure overhead creating deep shadow

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the open plaza into a shaded area beneath a massive concrete overpass. The character approaches and begins ascending a wide concrete stairway flanked by retaining walls, encountering an NPC descending the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper plaza with biohazard vehicle and gathered NPCs

events.description: exiting covered stairs into open upper plaza with biohazard truck visible

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper plaza past the biohazard truck and gathered NPCs

notable_agents.action: parked biohazard truck with yellow warning symbols and armed guards nearby
standing guard near the truck wearing tactical gear

entered.detail: large military-style truck with yellow biohazard symbols on the sides
open area covered with gravel and dirt rather than pavement

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs into an open upper plaza, the scene reveals a biohazard transport truck parked on gravel with several NPCs standing guard. The concrete overpass now looms overhead while modern buildings frame the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved walkway under overpass with landscaped trees

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved path away from the truck area, passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera along the curved pathway

entered.detail: winding dirt path bordered by low wooden fencing
low wooden fence running along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a curved walkway away from the plaza, passing under the continuing overpass structure. The path is lined with wooden fencing and landscaped trees, with occasional pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded forest trail into a sprawling, futuristic corporate plaza. It begins on a dirt path surrounded by thick foliage and dappled sunlight, moving past a fallen log toward a bright opening in the trees. As the camera emerges from the greenery, the scene opens into a sunlit concrete plaza featuring modern benches, a central light pillar, and towering glass office buildings. The movement then shifts into the shade beneath a massive concrete overpass, ascending a wide stairway and passing a descending pedestrian before emerging onto an upper gravel plaza where a biohazard transport truck is guarded by several NPCs. Finally, the camera follows a curved walkway lined with wooden fencing and landscaped trees, gliding under the continuing overpass structure as pedestrians pass by.
